title: quality_gate.waiver record
description: Durable, auditable record of a quality-gate waiver / finalize acknowledgement. `reason` is REQUIRED (the audit trail). `finalize_ack=true` acknowledges that a finalize-sensitive gate is intentionally waived: on a BOUND quest, finalize 'complete' is blocked while a finalize-sensitive gate is env-waived UNLESS a quality_gate.waiver with finalize_ack=true + reason exists for that gate (_finalize_waiver_ack_gate). Operator-authored (operator/orchestrator authority).

gate.description: gate name, e.g. baseline_contract / analysis_bridge / manuscript_coverage / review_verdict / provenance / authenticity

reason.description: REQUIRED human reason (a waiver without a reason is rejected)

finalize_ack.description: true acknowledges a finalize-sensitive waiver for finalize
